element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core offensive action available from start
Defeated enemies drop capsules to fill power gauge for enhanced firepower
Dropped from specific enemy squadrons; color-changeable by missile hits; each color produces unique effect (consecutive shot bonus, megaphone weapon, invulnerability)

element_introduction_order.element: Character selection and varied attack patterns
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Different characters have different firing patterns and abilities; multi-angle attack options available depending on character choice

element_introduction_order.element: Power gauge and enhanced firepower modes
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Filled by collecting power-ups; unlocks increased firepower options
Levels parody Konami franchises (Ganbare Goemon, TwinBee, Xexex fast-food theme); disco-themed levels documented

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe zones between enemy waves
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Horizontal-scrolling continuous pressure with rhythm breaks via power-up collection and safe passage windows; tension escalates per level progression

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Color-variant bells hidden in specific enemy squadrons; selection of character determines weapon patterns and coverage angles
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Bell items change color when hit by missiles, revealing different power-up effects; encourages experimental interactivity

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible; player adjusts starting lives and difficulty setting pre-game; basic enemies and movement introduction
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy squadron complexity; increased pressure from varied attack patterns; power-up management becomes critical
notable_spikes: Specific themed levels with parody-based obstacle patterns

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels parody Konami franchises (Ganbare Goemon, Tokimeki Memorial, TwinBee, Xexex); disco-themed level documented with unique visual and mechanical flavor
Specific squadrons drop power-ups and color-variant bells; defeating squadrons triggers relief windows; encourages tactical focus-fire

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Continuous horizontal scroll with obstacle navigation
notable_level_patterns.description: Player navigates two-dimensional level space avoiding obstructions while managing enemy encounters; eight-directional movement enables vertical and lateral dodging
